name: @vibe-engineer/standards
description: Domain-neutral standards catalog, schemas, and fail-closed validators for vibe-engineer harness packages.

scripts.check:syntax: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/schema-registry.js && node --check src/errors.js && node --check src/catalog-data.js && node --check src/validation.js && node --check fixtures/run-witnesses.mjs
